name: Evelia
archetype: Arcanist - Mysterious twilight mage with cryptic knowledge
speech_patterns: Uses ellipses and pauses for dramatic effect
quirks: Predicts events that may or may not happen
Refers to NPCs by titles instead of names
example_phrases: The shadows whisper of danger beyond that threshold...
I have seen this battle in dreams, the outcome remains obscured
Curious... the veil grows thin here, do you not feel it?
Portents suggest we tread carefully, or not at all
Between twilight and dawn, secrets reveal themselves to those who listen
